query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%status%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%process%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%queue%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%grade%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%transcript%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%status%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%process%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%queue%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%grade%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'calls' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%transcript%');
